emptyTopics.title: Start with your first topic
emptyTopics.description: The content grid is built around topics. Create the first one, then add funnel stages and platform publications.
steps: Topic — content project name (Excel: video / content title column)
Stage — funnel step: announcement, live stream, clips, and more
Publication — a post or video on a chosen platform
